message:
chore(beads): close P4.1 (Codex bats refresh) + file warn/ask e2e bug

Two beads-only updates flushed by `br sync --flush-only`:

- git_safety_guard-ovw4.2.1 ([P4.1] Fix stale CODEX_STATUS=unsupported
  assertions in agent_config_test.bats) → closed. Implementing commit
  is 76d1564, which fixed the bats assertions, added created/already/
  merged/stale-path/python3-missing coverage, and made configure_codex
  refresh stale dcg hook paths.
- git_safety_guard-0rqa filed: 11 warn-level e2e cases fail because
  scripts/e2e_test.sh expects empty stdout on warn but the hook now
  emits hookSpecificOutput JSON with permissionDecision=ask plus a
  stderr warning. Discovered while verifying P4.1 with the e2e suite.
  Decision needed on contract (ask JSON vs empty stdout) before fix.
